**Outcome:** [What did you walk away with?]

## Conversation Flow

> *Visual overview — delete this section if not needed.*

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor Me
    participant LLM as LLM Model

    Me->>LLM: Initial question
    LLM-->>Me: Response #1
    Note right of Me: Evaluate & refine
    Me->>LLM: Follow-up question
    LLM-->>Me: Response #2
    Note right of Me: Key insight captured
    Me->>LLM: Clarification
    LLM-->>Me: Final response
    Note over Me,LLM: Archive & extract lessons
```
